title: Honey, Where'd The Hamster Go
description: A mod about feeding our favorite little rodents nuclear material.
body:
"Honey, Where'd The Hamster Go" is a very small mod that features a single mechanic, feeding hamsters nuclear bombs. 

The mod supports using the nuclear bomb from Alex's Caves, and supports hamsters from `Hamsters Plus Lite` & `Spawn`. 

In the future I may polish some stuff and add compat for more mods, maybe even allowing hamsters to be fed overloaded reactors from Draconic Evolution for extra explosiveness.
